stemHtml:
A pilot flying where no ATC or advisory service is provided suffers a receiver failure. Besides prefacing all transmissions with "Transmitting blind due to receiver failure", which actions must be taken?

1. Land at nearest suitable aerodrome
2. Transmit position reports at scheduled times
3. Squawk 7600
4. Monitor 121.5
5. Transmit intended actions
6. Descend to circuit height
